item.title: The Giving Tree
item.author: Author
item.description: Once there was a tree and she loved a little boy. Every day the boy would come and he would gather her leaves and make them into crowns and play king of the forest He would climb up her trunk and swing from her branches and eat apples. And they would play hide-and-go–seek would 将要 climb v. 爬; 攀爬; 上升 n.爬; 攀
